note: MemVfs in-process; SF=0.01 (60000 rows); Q6 mapped as one Op::Aggregate{SUM, field=l_q6_revenue} with multi-predicate WHERE (l_shipdate range + l_discount range + l_quantity < 24). l_q6_revenue is the precomputed l_extendedprice * l_discount product stored at load (KesselDB has no SUM(expr) primitive yet). SP-Analytic-Plan T4: range index on l_shipdate + range_preds=[>= 19940101, <19950101] narrow the scan via the order index (the ~8K-row 1994 window out of 60K). Ops/sec = full Q6 executions/sec.
